meta.name: anky onboarding animatic
meta.notes: All timings validated against reference/animatic_v1.html. Story runs 0-20600ms, then lazure dissolve and handoff into the live name-entry screen. No audio; must work fully muted.

beats.label: TIME CUT - millennia later
beats.note: HARD CUT. fade_in_ms=0 is intentional and non-negotiable. This cut carries the product thesis.

beats.label: recognition
beats.note: Crossfade from beat 4 - frames are near-identical so the fade reads as the eyes lifting to the viewer.

beats.label: carving yours - patience
beats.note: Longest hold in the piece, by design. Do not shorten.

beats.label: the loop closes
beats.note: Same asset as beat 1. Reverse zoom (settling). At 0:00 the blank wood was about to receive anky's name; here it is about to receive the user's.

carve_reveal.description: Beat 3 renders 03a_carve_pre (word cloned out) with 03b_carve_post masked on top. The mask reveals left-to-right in halting strokes so the letters appear as if carved. Values are the revealed fraction of image width. Steps are grouped per letter (a: 3 strokes, n: 2, k: 3, y: 2) with pauses between letters - this is the anky protocol rhythm applied to a knife.

handoff.question: what should i call you?
handoff.question_font: Fraunces, lowercase, same size/weight/position as the shipped name-entry screen. NOT a lookalike - the literal same view.
handoff.cursor: blinking, 1060ms period, appears 500ms before first character
handoff.keyboard: the real iOS keyboard via focusing the real name TextField - not a mock
